## Meeting Purpose

[Interview Brian Gioia for an Account Executive role at GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/_1UzKTP65fMgA5_MD5wqJdPaPKepXtsv?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strong Candidate:** Brian Gioia has 15+ years of sales experience, consistently selling to marketing leaders at companies like Sprout Social, Metadata, and StackAdapt.](https://fathom.video/share/_1UzKTP65fMgA5_MD5wqJdPaPKepXtsv?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [**Strategic Sales:** A key example is the Coinbase deal, which grew from a $10k social care pilot to a $90k social listening expansion by proving the value of crisis management and content insights.](https://fathom.video/share/_1UzKTP65fMgA5_MD5wqJdPaPKepXtsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1062.0)
  - [**GrowthX Fit:** Brian sees GrowthX's AI platform as a tool to help companies consolidate headcount and bring content creation in-house, replacing expensive agencies.](https://fathom.video/share/_1UzKTP65fMgA5_MD5wqJdPaPKepXtsv?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [**Critical Need:** GrowthX needs help building scalable sales processes for both its white-glove services and a new, higher-volume product launch.](https://fathom.video/share/_1UzKTP65fMgA5_MD5wqJdPaPKepXtsv?tab=summary&timestamp=2981.0)

## Topics

### Candidate Background & Motivation

  - [**Sales Journey:** Started in sports (Chicago Bulls) → moved to tech startups (Groupon) → focused on marketing tech (Sprout Social, Metadata, StackAdapt).](https://fathom.video/share/_1UzKTP65fMgA5_MD5wqJdPaPKepXtsv?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [**GrowthX Motivation:**](https://fathom.video/share/_1UzKTP65fMgA5_MD5wqJdPaPKepXtsv?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
      - [**AI Opportunity:** Believes AI is the future and GrowthX's platform is a compelling product.](https://fathom.video/share/_1UzKTP65fMgA5_MD5wqJdPaPKepXtsv?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
      - [**Agency Displacement:** Sees a clear value prop in helping companies replace expensive agencies and consolidate headcount by bringing content creation in-house.](https://fathom.video/share/_1UzKTP65fMgA5_MD5wqJdPaPKepXtsv?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Sales Philosophy & Experience

  - [**Marketing Strategy:** Views all marketing channels (paid, organic, social) as connected; the core goal is to drive traffic and action with a consistent message.](https://fathom.video/share/_1UzKTP65fMgA5_MD5wqJdPaPKepXtsv?tab=summary&timestamp=723.0)
  - [**Prospecting:**](https://fathom.video/share/_1UzKTP65fMgA5_MD5wqJdPaPKepXtsv?tab=summary&timestamp=2177.0)
      - [**Inbound-Driven Outbound:** Uses inbound wins to fuel targeted outbound campaigns to competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/_1UzKTP65fMgA5_MD5wqJdPaPKepXtsv?tab=summary&timestamp=2216.0)
      - [**Personalization:** Prefers handwritten emails and creative tactics (e.g., drawing logos) to humanize outreach.](https://fathom.video/share/_1UzKTP65fMgA5_MD5wqJdPaPKepXtsv?tab=summary&timestamp=2325.0)
      - [**Strategic Targeting:** Focuses on a top 50–75 account list, understanding the "good, better, best" customer profiles.](https://fathom.video/share/_1UzKTP65fMgA5_MD5wqJdPaPKepXtsv?tab=summary&timestamp=2298.0)

### Case Study: Coinbase Deal (Sprout Social)

  - [**Problem:** Coinbase needed a scalable way to handle customer care and monitor its brand perception during rapid growth.](https://fathom.video/share/_1UzKTP65fMgA5_MD5wqJdPaPKepXtsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)
  - [**Solution:** A two-phase deal that grew from a social care pilot to a full social listening platform.](https://fathom.video/share/_1UzKTP65fMgA5_MD5wqJdPaPKepXtsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)
  - [**Value Prop:**](https://fathom.video/share/_1UzKTP65fMgA5_MD5wqJdPaPKepXtsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)
      - [**Phase 1 (Social Care):** Improved customer response times and CSAT scores.](https://fathom.video/share/_1UzKTP65fMgA5_MD5wqJdPaPKepXtsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)
      - [**Phase 2 (Social Listening):** Provided real-time sentiment analysis and crisis management, informing future content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/_1UzKTP65fMgA5_MD5wqJdPaPKepXtsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)
  - [**Outcome:** A 1-year deal, growing from a typical $10k–$20k deal to $90k, becoming the team's largest at the time.](https://fathom.video/share/_1UzKTP65fMgA5_MD5wqJdPaPKepXtsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [**Key Learnings:**](https://fathom.video/share/_1UzKTP65fMgA5_MD5wqJdPaPKepXtsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1891.0)
      - [**Success:** Persistent champion management and using a personalized demo environment to prove value.](https://fathom.video/share/_1UzKTP65fMgA5_MD5wqJdPaPKepXtsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)
      - [**Improvement:** Engage power (VP of Marketing) and commercial discovery (legal/procurement) earlier to shorten the sales cycle.](https://fathom.video/share/_1UzKTP65fMgA5_MD5wqJdPaPKepXtsv?tab=summary&timestamp=2106.0)

### GrowthX Context & Needs

  - [**Sales Team:** Currently a team of one (Tyler Pavlas), handling high inbound demand.](https://fathom.video/share/_1UzKTP65fMgA5_MD5wqJdPaPKepXtsv?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
  - [**Win Factors:**](https://fathom.video/share/_1UzKTP65fMgA5_MD5wqJdPaPKepXtsv?tab=summary&timestamp=2482.0)
      - [**Expertise:** Marcel's background (ex-CMO at Scale AI) and the team's AEO/GEO knowledge.](https://fathom.video/share/_1UzKTP65fMgA5_MD5wqJdPaPKepXtsv?tab=summary&timestamp=2482.0)
      - [**Product Superiority:** A scalable, end-to-end platform that outperforms custom GPTs and typical SEO agencies.](https://fathom.video/share/_1UzKTP65fMgA5_MD5wqJdPaPKepXtsv?tab=summary&timestamp=2522.0)
  - [**Loss Factors:**](https://fathom.video/share/_1UzKTP65fMgA5_MD5wqJdPaPKepXtsv?tab=summary&timestamp=2625.0)
      - [**Customer Mismatch:** Prospects wanting services beyond GrowthX's core content offering.](https://fathom.video/share/_1UzKTP65fMgA5_MD5wqJdPaPKepXtsv?tab=summary&timestamp=2625.0)
      - [**Skepticism:** Doubts about the ROI of organic content or the technical capabilities of AI-driven creation.](https://fathom.video/share/_1UzKTP65fMgA5_MD5wqJdPaPKepXtsv?tab=summary&timestamp=2625.0)
  - [**Key Needs:**](https://fathom.video/share/_1UzKTP65fMgA5_MD5wqJdPaPKepXtsv?tab=summary&timestamp=2981.0)
      - [**Process Improvement:** Build a better demo experience and a more robust search opportunity analysis process.](https://fathom.video/share/_1UzKTP65fMgA5_MD5wqJdPaPKepXtsv?tab=summary&timestamp=2730.0)
      - [**Sales Capacity:** Support two distinct sales motions:](https://fathom.video/share/_1UzKTP65fMgA5_MD5wqJdPaPKepXtsv?tab=summary&timestamp=2981.0)
          - [**White-Glove Services:** Collaborate on larger, consultative deals.](https://fathom.video/share/_1UzKTP65fMgA5_MD5wqJdPaPKepXtsv?tab=summary&timestamp=2981.0)
          - [**New Product Launch:** Lead sales for a new, higher-volume, lower-ACV product.](https://fathom.video/share/_1UzKTP65fMgA5_MD5wqJdPaPKepXtsv?tab=summary&timestamp=2981.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler Pavlas:** Provide feedback to the hiring team (Tucker and Bridget).](https://fathom.video/share/_1UzKTP65fMgA5_MD5wqJdPaPKepXtsv?tab=summary&timestamp=3149.0)
  - [**Hiring Team:** Contact Brian Gioia with next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/_1UzKTP65fMgA5_MD5wqJdPaPKepXtsv?tab=summary&timestamp=3149.0)
